recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.

recommendations.title: Sex Appeal
recommendations.overview: Avery, a teenager with a tendency towards perfectionism, enlists her friend Larson to help her prepare for her first time with her long-distance boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Teddy
recommendations.overview: In a rural French town, twenty-something Teddy is scratched by an unknown beast and slowly undergoes frightening changes.

recommendations.title: A Dog Named Palma

recommendations.title: Cool Runnings
recommendations.overview: When a Jamaican sprinter is disqualified from the Olympic Games, he enlists the help of a dishonored coach to start the first Jamaican bobsled team.

recommendations.title: Serial (Bad) Weddings
recommendations.overview: A catholic French couple sees their life upside down when their four daughters get married to men of different religion and origins.

recommendations.title: The Terminal
recommendations.overview: An Eastern European tourist unexpectedly finds himself stranded in JFK airport, and must take up temporary residence there.
